add_ladder.abort: 🛑 ABORT if XAG weekly close <$60 (V-14 velocity floor) — capital preservation > opportunity

floor_framework.velocity_note: V-14 — physical demand creates a VELOCITY floor (silver can't STAY below $60-65 long), NOT a LEVEL floor (CAN touch $55-58 in cascade). Physical responds in 2-6 weeks; paper cascades in 2-6 days.

tiers.mechanism: Consolidation at descending wedge upper — HIGHEST weight
Tail-risk: credit event + DXY breakout + margin cascade

strategy_timeline.title: OFFENSIVE deployment
strategy_timeline.summary: Front-load Rs.~3.5Cr between $75-80 spot; target $95 trim 40-60%; goal 20% blended gain. ~15k SBees deployed week of 5/2.

strategy_timeline.title: V-15 doctrine recalibration
strategy_timeline.summary: 4 bull / 5 neutral / 0 bear non-chart agents = LEANING. Same trim/add ladder. 4 gap data points filled (COMEX/SLV/Fed/copper). Fed-hold reality softened v2 stack.

strategy_timeline.title: Chart-read FRESH-BULL tilt
strategy_timeline.summary: 19-chart drop. Daily MACD positive+expanding; weekly channel intact; monthly $50-wedge breakout. V-15 ±3pp shift A 27→30%, B 36→33%. Trim timing compressed days-to-weeks.

strategy_timeline.title: India duty-hike sticky
strategy_timeline.summary: SBees held duty-hike gains at ₹270.93 even as XAGUSD pulled back from intraday $89.17 to $86.87. Physical premium sticky. F98 trim now dual-threshold.

strategy_timeline.title: FROTH threshold breached
strategy_timeline.summary: MM net +15.76K, W/W +4.92K — largest single-week move in 6-print sequence. OI +6.87K = first material expansion. Asymmetric capitulation edge COMPRESSED; size-up window closing.
